discovery.title: Find printers
discovery.networkHint: First three octets of a /24 (e.g. 192.168.1) — scans only those hosts, faster. Multiple: new lines or commas. Leave empty to scan from your network interfaces.
discovery.networkInvalid: Invalid format: use three octets (e.g. 192.168.1) or four ending in .0 (192.168.1.0).
discovery.emptyHint: Tap Search to discover printers on the network.

phase.fallback_prepare: No hits — trying common home subnets…

discovery.webNoScan: LAN scan only works in the installed desktop app, not in the browser.
discovery.newPrintersPreview: New printers ({{count}}) — tap the green plus to save; unconfirmed ones are removed when you tap Done

printer.deleteConfirmDescription: {{name}} will be removed from the farm list. The printer itself is not changed.
printer.removeOnDoneHint: Marked for removal — tap Done to apply, or tap the green plus to keep
printer.directUrlInvalid: Enter a host or full URL with port.
printer.alreadyInFarm: This address is already in the farm.
printer.offlineAuthHint: Moonraker returned 401/403. Enter the API key if one is configured, or add this PC’s IP to trusted_clients in moonraker.conf.
printer.offlineUnreachableHint: No response (timeout, firewall, wrong URL/port, or the host is not on this network).
printer.upstreamNewerMoonraker: A newer Moonraker tag is on GitHub: {{tag}}
printer.upstreamNewerKlipper: A newer Klipper tag is on GitHub: {{tag}}

statusHint.dirtyBuild: Uncommitted changes in the reported firmware version (dirty build).
statusHint.offlineAuth: Moonraker rejected the request (401/403). Check API key and trusted_clients.
statusHint.offlineUnreachable: No reply from the host (timeout, firewall, or wrong address).
statusHint.klippyNotConnected: Klipper is not connected to Moonraker (service stopped, crashed, or not started).
statusHint.klippyBusy: Klipper not ready for a job yet (state: {{state}}).
statusHint.errorUnknown: Printer is in an error state; check Moonraker and Klipper logs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.farmNameHint: Shown in the top bar. Saved when you close this dialog.
settings.developerModeHint: Shows tools to export diagnostics for debugging (e.g. support or an AI assistant).
settings.devToolsHint: Copy JSON to the clipboard. Printer list omits API keys; the full bundle includes persisted my3dfarm* storage — review before sharing.
